_comment: Mixamo retarget map. Source rig is ~65 bones; we keep ~16 and drop fingers, twist bones, and the spine subdivisions we don't have. mixamorig:Hips → torso_lower puts the gait pivot at the right place; mixamorig:Spine and Spine1/2 collapse onto our 3 torso bones; head sits on neck. restDeltas are starting guesses — eyeball-tune by importing 'idle' and adjusting until arms hang at your rest position.
